blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,633 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 61 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 1.4" of snow, highs of 19°F, gusts to 61 mph.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 42°F, gusts to 47 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 1.6" of snow, highs of 45°F, gusts to 59 mph.
Wednesday: flurries, highs of 13°F, gusts to 59 mph.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 25°F, gusts to 44 mph. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
